stemHtml: Prior to flight, the pilots are reviewing the en-route weather conditions and note a SIGMET which states that severe mountain waves are expected after departure, and the SIGMET is valid until 11:00 UTC. Their flight departs at 11:45 UTC, will they encounter the mountain waves after departure?

options.a: They will not know, as the SIGMET is only valid until 11:00 UTC.
options.b: No, the mountain waves will stop at 11:00 UTC.
options.c: Yes, as the SIGMET is valid for 3 hours after the published end time.
options.d: Yes, the mountain waves will be there all day.
